zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD处于窄幅震荡偏强结构，价格在68附近横盘整理，波动收窄但未出现明显回调信号，多空进入短期均衡状态。整体方向略偏多观察

MACD维持正值0.35附近，动能仍偏多，但缺乏信号线配合；均线方面价格站上SMA20=67.60，短期趋势仍受支撑结构稳固增强

下方支撑关注67.6与67整数关口，上方阻力集中于68.2及前高区域，若放量突破则有望延续上行，否则继续震荡区间偏整理中

操作上建议以低吸为主，回踩SMA20附近分批布局，严格止损67下方，短线目标看68.8至69区间控制仓位风险执行纪律严

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently moving within a tight consolidation range around 68, reflecting a market pause after recent minor volatility. Price action shows very low intraday spread, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the flat 24-hour performance, structure remains slightly constructive as price holds above short-term moving average support. This positioning indicates a neutral-to-mildly bullish bias as long as the lower boundary remains intact.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously positive picture, with MACD reading above zero suggesting residual bullish momentum. However, absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation of trend strength and makes directional conviction less reliable. The price holding above the 20-period SMA near 67.60 reinforces near-term support and indicates buyers are still defending dips. Without RSI data, overbought or oversold conditions remain unclear, so price structure becomes the primary guide.

Key support is concentrated at the 20-period SMA around 67.60, followed by a stronger psychological floor near 67.00. A breakdown below this zone could open room for a deeper retracement toward the mid-66 region. On the upside, immediate resistance is seen at 68.20, which aligns with recent intraday highs, while a sustained break above this level may target 69.00 as the next liquidity area.

Given the current low-volatility environment, short-term traders may favor range-based strategies, buying near support and taking profits near resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a decisive close above 68.20 or below 67.60 to confirm directional expansion. Risk management remains critical, with tight stop-loss placement due to compressed price action. Overall structure favors cautious participation while monitoring for volatility expansion signals.
